name: Mini Cheesecakes #2
recipeIngredient: 1 can 21 oz Pie Filling, any flavor
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Combine the Graham cracker crumbs, sugar, and melted butter in a bowl until well mixed.
3. Press equal portions of the mixture into the bottoms of 24 lightly greased muffin cups.
4. In a large mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese until fluffy.
5. Gradually add the sweetened condensed milk to the cream cheese until smooth.
6. Add the eggs and vanilla extract, then mix well until combined.
7. Spoon equal amounts of the mixture into the prepared muffin cups.
8. Bake for 20 minutes or until set.
9. Allow to cool, then chill before topping with pie filling.
10. Store refrigerated.
